metadata.author: Ejentum
metadata.description: Library of 679 cognitive operations across four harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory), each with dynamic and adaptive retrieval modes. Eight tools total: four dynamic on all tiers, four adaptive (Go or Super tier) where an adapter LLM rewrites the matched operation with task-specific identifiers. Each operation is engineered in two layers: a natural-language procedure (named failure pattern, steps, suppression vectors, falsification test) and an executable reasoning topology (a DAG with decision gates, parallel branches, bounded loops, meta-cognitive exit nodes). The agent reads both layers before responding. Exposed to AutoGen Studio as a single McpWorkbench. Two install paths: stdio via the ejentum-mcp npm package (default in this gallery entry), or hosted HTTPS at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp for HTTP-MCP clients (Bearer auth via EJENTUM_API_KEY).

workbenches.description: Ejentum Reasoning Harness via MCP. The agent calls one of eight tools: four dynamic (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) on all tiers, or four adaptive (adaptive-reasoning, adaptive-code, adaptive-anti-deception, adaptive-memory) where an adapter LLM rewrites the matched operation with task-specific identifiers. Each call retrieves a task-matched cognitive operation from a library of 679, engineered in two layers (natural-language procedure plus executable reasoning topology DAG). Two install paths: stdio via the ejentum-mcp npm package, or hosted HTTPS at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp (Bearer auth via EJENTUM_API_KEY; 30-day free trial; adaptive tools require Go or Super tier).
workbenches.label: Ejentum Reasoning Harness
